title: Functional Models, Values, and Observable Effects · Independent Transformation Trial
summary: Refactor a mutable billing script whose hidden state makes reruns disagree. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of an effect map and behavior-preserving functional baseline with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish value transformations from identity-changing commands in an execution trace.
Locate I/O, mutation, time, randomness, and exceptions and move them behind explicit boundaries.
Test whether an expression can be replaced by its value without changing program behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
